name_cn:
Genuine Leather
Crinkled Nappa Leather Bracelet Bag
9751
Color: Deep Olive
This versatile tubular bag is crafted from crinkled Nappa lambskin and can be worn as a bracelet. Both ends are adorned with embossed lambskin panels.
Detachable and adjustable strap, snap closure
Zipper closure, matching pull tab
Unlined
Anagram embossed 25-10-10
